problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Small. Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
